final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand promotional poster for RAN QIU, in the warm reverence of Eastern minimalist aesthetics with natural poetry and golden-hour stillness.

Style/medium: brand poster with the quiet restraint of 原研哉's visual language — generous white breathing room, shallow depth of field, warm ink-wash minimalism meeting natural poetry
Composition: asymmetric tension with abundant negative space, the brand mark anchored in calm equilibrium, natural elements drifting at the periphery like fallen leaves on still water
Subject: the RAN QIU brand identity held within a composition of autumnal natural elements — dried botanicals, soft textile folds, or a single branch with turning leaves
Scene/backdrop: an unhurried deep-autumn atmosphere, as if the air itself has slowed to amber
Lighting/mood: golden hour's last warmth, the light of late afternoon that turns everything into memory — soft, diffused, no hard shadows, only the gentle conversation between warmth and shadow
Color palette: deep autumn rust #8B3A1E in quiet dialogue with parchment #E8DCCB and warm gold-brown #D4A574 — the palette of dried persimmons and aged paper
Materials/textures: the matte softness of uncoated paper, the fine grain of natural linen, the translucent warmth of pressed botanical specimens
Text (verbatim): RAN QIU
Constraints: brand colors #8B3A1E / #E8DCCB / #D4A574 must be present; generous white space; warm tonal range throughout
Avoid: cold tones, high contrast hard lighting, busy backgrounds, decorative excess, Western luxury poster clichés, neon or synthetic color intrusion
